  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary purpose of a storyboard in the UI/UX design process?",
      "options": ["A) To create a detailed wireframe of the final design", "B) To visualize the user journey and interactions", "C) To present the design concept to stakeholders", "D) To develop a prototype",
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "A storyboard is used to illustrate the sequence of events and user interactions, helping designers to plan and refine their design
